context: Tests whether the agent implements video commerce analytics with the correct KPI metrics, correctly identifies and fixes CORS issues for embedded shoppable video players, and documents iOS video encoding requirements (H.264/AAC, not VP9).

checklist.name: hotspotCTR metric
checklist.description: getVideoCommerceMetrics() returns a hotspotCTR field calculated as hotspotClicks / views

checklist.name: addToCartRate metric
checklist.description: getVideoCommerceMetrics() returns an addToCartRate field calculated as addToCarts / views

checklist.name: purchaseRate / videoCVR
checklist.description: getVideoCommerceMetrics() returns a purchaseRate (or videoCVR) field calculated as purchases / views

checklist.name: completionRate metric
checklist.description: getVideoCommerceMetrics() returns a completionRate or avgCompletion field measuring average watch-through percentage

checklist.name: Parallel data fetching
checklist.description: getVideoCommerceMetrics() fetches the underlying data counts concurrently (e.g., using Promise.all) rather than sequentially awaiting each query

checklist.name: CORS root cause
checklist.description: technical-report.md correctly identifies the root cause of add-to-cart failures as cross-origin request blocking (CORS) on the cart API endpoint

checklist.name: CORS fix
checklist.description: technical-report.md recommends configuring the cart API to allow cross-origin requests from the embed domain (e.g., via CORS headers, Access-Control-Allow-Origin)

checklist.name: iOS codec root cause
checklist.description: technical-report.md correctly identifies that VP9 codec is not supported on iOS Safari as the cause of video load failures

checklist.name: H.264 + AAC requirement
checklist.description: technical-report.md recommends H.264 video codec AND AAC audio codec as the required encoding for iOS compatibility (both must be present)

checklist.name: Views count included
checklist.description: getVideoCommerceMetrics() returns a raw views count field in addition to the rate metrics

checklist.name: TypeScript return type
checklist.description: getVideoCommerceMetrics() is typed in TypeScript with a defined return shape (interface, type alias, or inline object type) that includes the named metric fields
